quote: Hey team! This Friday, we hosted a tennis tournament in our Warsaw office in Poland I put this together after seeing how much you all enjoy playing during breaks, and I thought it would be a nice way to bring everyone together for something fun and a little competitive The tournament turned out very

title: From #general
headline: Happy Monday, everyone! This past Saturday, our Parkland office took part in the...
quote: Happy Monday, everyone! This past Saturday, our Parkland office took part in the Greatest American Cleanup event and spent the morning cleaning up Red Reef Park beach. It was a beautiful day by the ocean, and getting to do something meaningful together, with family in tow , made it even more special
author: Oxana Drake
